privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic test data with three patient identities: TESTUNIQUE/Alice (unique match case with GUID TEST_GUID_ALICE_001), TESTDUP/Bob (inserted twice to create duplicate match scenario), and TESTMISSING/Charlie (deliberately not inserted to test missing patient case). Appointment data is generated in /home/ga/Documents/legacy_appointments.csv with dates in DD/MM/YYYY format (25/12/2023, 26/12/2023, 27/12/2023). The database is the MedinTux DrTuxTest MySQL database using real medical software schema (IndexNomPrenom and fchpat tables). Output files are ready_import.csv (for uniquely matched patients with GUID and YYYY-MM-DD dates) and review_required.csv (for duplicate and missing matches).
